title: Revert backend to Draft Version 15

requirements.text: Revert the backend (backend/main.mo) to its Draft Version 15 state, restoring all types, persistent state definitions, and query/update methods (inventory, transactions, work orders, shop settings, user profiles, reports, and access control) exactly as they were in that version.

quotes: draft version 15 adalah yang terbaik, bisakah dikembalikan ke versi tersebut.

acceptanceCriteria: backend/main.mo matches the Draft Version 15 implementation in structure and logic
All query and update methods present in Draft Version 15 are restored and functional
No Draft Version 21 changes remain in the backend

requirements.text: Revert CashierPage (frontend/src/pages/CashierPage.tsx) to its Draft Version 15 state, restoring all component dependencies, UI layout, cart logic, and transaction completion flow as specified in the feature evidence report.

quotes: draft version 15 adalah yang terbaik, bisakah dikembalikan ke versi tersebut.

acceptanceCriteria: CashierPage matches the Draft Version 15 implementation
Cart functionality, customer/vehicle info fields, and receipt dialog work as in Draft Version 15
No Draft Version 21 changes remain in CashierPage

requirements.text: Revert InventoryPage (frontend/src/pages/InventoryPage.tsx) to its Draft Version 15 state, restoring all component dependencies, search, stock management, low-stock indicators, and Excel import/export features as specified in the feature evidence report.

quotes: draft version 15 adalah yang terbaik, bisakah dikembalikan ke versi tersebut.

acceptanceCriteria: InventoryPage matches the Draft Version 15 implementation
Add, edit, delete, search, and Excel import/export work as in Draft Version 15
No Draft Version 21 changes remain in InventoryPage

requirements.text: Revert ServicePage (frontend/src/pages/ServicePage.tsx) to its Draft Version 15 state, restoring all component dependencies, work order creation/completion/deletion flow, search, and cashier navigation as specified in the feature evidence report.

quotes: draft version 15 adalah yang terbaik, bisakah dikembalikan ke versi tersebut.

acceptanceCriteria: ServicePage matches the Draft Version 15 implementation
Create, complete, delete, and search work orders work as in Draft Version 15
Navigation to cashier page with pre-filled customer data works as in Draft Version 15
No Draft Version 21 changes remain in ServicePage

constraints: Do not introduce any changes beyond restoring Draft Version 15 state
Do not modify immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Introducing new features or UI improvements beyond Draft Version 15
Applying any Draft Version 21 logic or UI changes
Modifying pages or backend logic not listed in the revert scope
